rules.reason: Calcium carbonate can bind levothyroxine (Thyroxine) in the GI tract, reducing its absorption by up to 30%.
rules.reason_hindi: कैल्शियम थायरोक्सिन के अवशोषण को कम कर सकता है।
rules.recommendation: Take Thyroxine on an empty stomach at least 4 hours before Calcium.

rules.reason: Antacids containing Magnesium or Aluminum reduce the concentration of Ciprofloxacin.
rules.reason_hindi: एंटासिड सिप्रोफ्लोक्सासिन के असर को कम कर सकता है।
rules.recommendation: Maintain a 2-hour gap between these medicines.

rules.reason: Calcium in milk competes with Iron for absorption.
rules.reason_hindi: दूध आयरन के अवशोषण में बाधा डाल सकता है।
rules.recommendation: Do not take Iron tablets with milk. Keep 2 hours gap.

rules.reason: Probiotics in curd can be killed by antibiotics, and some dairy products interfere with absorption.
rules.reason_hindi: दही और एंटीबायोटिक के बीच अंतर रखें।
rules.recommendation: Wait 2 hours between Curd and Antibiotics.
